input.background:
Identify the data types represented by these variables:

\begin{tabular}{|l|l|l|l|}
\hline Variable & Nominal & Ordinal & Interval/ratio\\
\hline Ratio of a tree's breadth to its height & & \\
\hline Level of trampling on a footpath (low, medium or high) & & \\
\hline Of the invertebrates caught in a trap, the percentage that are herbivorous (plant eating) & & \\
\hline Number of lorries passing a census point within one hour & & \\
\hline Footpath construction (concrete, gravel, none) & & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
input.question: What is the data type for 'Number of lorries passing a census point within one hour'?

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
